km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស
km.Northumberland, England: ណូរtហុមប៊ើលែន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan De Héron於1166年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親William De Héron26歲，母親Christina De Notton24歲。他與Mrs Jordan De Heron II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1213年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordan De Héron于1166年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲William De Héron26岁，母亲Christina De Notton24岁。他与Mrs Jordan De Heron II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1213年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Héron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan De Héron was born in 1166, in Northumberland, England, his father, William De Héron, was 26 and his mother, Christina De Notton, was 24. He married Mrs Jordan De Heron II. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1213, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordan De Héron est né en 1166, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William De Héron, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christina De Notton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Jordan De Heron II. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1213, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordan De Héron 1166 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Héron 26 und seine Mutter Christina De Notton 24. Er hat Mrs Jordan De Heron II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1213 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan De Héron è nato il nel 1166 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William De Héron, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Christina De Notton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Jordan De Heron II. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1213, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Jordan De Héronが1166年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William De Héronは26歳，母Christina De Nottonは24歳であった。Mrs Jordan De Heron IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1213年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan De Héron(이)가 1166년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Héron(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina De Notton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Mrs Jordan De Heron II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1213년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan De Héron nasceu em 1166, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Héron, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Christina De Notton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Jordan De Heron II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1213, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan De Héron родился в 1166 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Héron было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina De Notton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Jordan De Heron II. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1213 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordan De Héron nació en 1166, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Héron, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Christina De Notton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs Jordan De Heron II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1213, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
